task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the existing Path B collapse in the current workspace: `EditModePanel` requires explicit `coreState`, `imageEditState`, and `variantsState`; `useEditModePanelState` no longer reads lightbox or image-edit contexts; and `EditPanelLayout` consumes explicit variant props instead of reading `useLightboxVariantsSafe()` internally. `ImageLightboxControlsPanel` supplies those props from the lightbox boundary, while `InlineEditView` supplies them from `useInlineEditState`, leaving a single variant-selector path and preserving close-button flush/close behavior. Validation: eslint passed on the touched panel files; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` passed with 42/42 files and 183/183 tests; `InlineEditView.test.tsx` covers explicit state props, close-button wiring, single variant-selector rendering, and select/make-primary/delete actions. Full `npm test` still ends with the same unrelated 19 failed files / 36 failed tests already tracked outside this batch.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed there is exactly one state source for this edit-panel path: `EditModePanel` and `EditPanelLayout` consume explicit props, and `useEditModePanelState` no longer uses context fallbacks such as `useLightboxCoreSafe`, `useLightboxVariantsSafe`, `useImageEditCanvasSafe`, `useImageEditForm`, or `useImageEditStatusSafe`. `InlineEditView` still closes through the panel header button after flushing text fields, and the inline boundary test verifies the single variant-selector path plus select, make-primary, and delete actions.
